message:
feat(wa): integrate workflow runner into wa watch --auto-handle

- runtime.rs: Activate event_bus and publish PatternDetected events
  after persisting detections to storage
- main.rs: Full workflow runner integration when --auto-handle flag set
  - Creates EventBus for detection routing
  - Sets up PolicyEngine with permissive defaults
  - Creates WorkflowEngine and PaneWorkflowLockManager
  - Registers HandleCompaction workflow
  - Spawns workflow runner event loop subscribing to detection events
  - Passes event_bus to ObservationRuntime via with_event_bus()

Bead: wa-nu4.1.1.8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
